title: crataegus monogyna subsp. acutiloba
intro: Crataegus monogyna subsp. acutiloba is a subspecies of hawthorn tree native to Europe, characterized by its sharp-pointed leaves and small white flowers. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its fruit, leaves, and flowers, which are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna subsp. acutiloba include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exert antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Crataegus monogyna subsp. acutiloba can be prepared as herbal supplements, teas, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and support overall well-being.
